title: Rules and regulations
doc_html:
§2657. Rules and regulations

            The commissioner shall promulgate rules and regulations necessary to implement this Chapter.

            Acts 2022, No. 591, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2023.
doc_text:
§2657.  Rules and regulations
The commissioner shall promulgate rules and regulations necessary to implement this
Chapter.
Acts 2022, No. 591, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2023.
